completedTasks: ai-service/schemas/agents.py — ResearchBrief, WebknotContextOutput, PackagingInput/Output, all Sprint 2 schemas

inProgressTasks: Stage 1 end-to-end orchestration (Node: research + context parallel → packaging sequential)
MinIO direct upload from Python (packaging.py has placeholder URL — needs minio-py)

blockers.blocker: MinIO upload in packaging.py returns placeholder URL — real upload needs minio-py added to pyproject.toml and MinIO client wired

keyDecisions.decision: Stub KB data hardcoded in context_manager.py
keyDecisions.rationale: KB doesn't exist yet (Sprint 9). Stubs return general Webknot capabilities filtered by domain. Graceful warning surfaced when no projects found.

keyDecisions.decision: Slide plan generated by LLM (GPT-4o-mini), then rendered by python-pptx
keyDecisions.rationale: LLM decides the narrative structure; python-pptx handles the rendering. Separation of concerns — content vs format.

keyDecisions.decision: POST /api/internal/job-update protected by x-ai-internal-secret only (no JWT)
keyDecisions.rationale: Internal route, never exposed to public. AI service is co-deployed. JWT is for user-facing routes only.

keyDecisions.decision: Tavily as default search provider (configurable to Brave via SEARCH_PROVIDER env)
keyDecisions.rationale: Tavily has better structured output for research use cases. Brave as fallback option.

nextAgentInstructions.forge_complete_sprint2: Three things still needed to close Sprint 2: (1) minio-py in pyproject.toml + real MinIO upload in packaging.py — replace _upload_to_minio() placeholder with actual minio.Minio client upload + presign; (2) Stage 1 end-to-end orchestration in Node: engagement.routes.ts or orchestrator/index.ts — when both research + context jobs complete (via /api/internal/job-update), automatically enqueue packaging job; (3) MeetMinds adapter wiring for Stage 2 — POST /api/engagements/:id/meetminds-reference route. These are the remaining Sprint 2 tasks.
nextAgentInstructions.warden: Review Sprint 2 Python workers. Key checks: (1) research.py — graceful when Tavily API key missing? (2) context_manager.py — warning surfaced correctly when KB empty? (3) packaging.py — quality checker catches placeholders? (4) internal.routes.ts — secret validation correct? Does it properly update AgentJob + fire WS events? (5) dispatcher.py — worker_map imports correct, fallback to stub_worker for unregistered types?
